=== RUN   TestSimpleTestSuite
=== RUN   TestSimpleTestSuite/TestSucceeds
=== RUN   TestSimpleTestSuite/TestFails
    ptest_test.go:45: assertion failed: got: "+ 1 line\n- 1 line\n+ 1 line\n"
--- FAIL: TestSimpleTestSuite (<TIMESTAMP>)
    --- PASS: TestSimpleTestSuite/TestSucceeds (<TIMESTAMP>)
    --- FAIL: TestSimpleTestSuite/TestFails (<TIMESTAMP>)
=== RUN   TestSimpleTestSuite
=== RUN   TestSimpleTestSuite/TestSucceeds#01
=== RUN   TestSimpleTestSuite/TestFails#01
    pxtest_test.go:45: assertion failed: got: "+ 1 line\n- 1 line\n+ 1 line\n"
--- FAIL: TestSimpleTestSuite (<TIMESTAMP>)
    --- PASS: TestSimpleTestSuite/TestSucceeds#01 (<TIMESTAMP>)
    --- FAIL: TestSimpleTestSuite/TestFails#01 (<TIMESTAMP>)
FAIL
FAIL	github.com/mvrahden/go-test/examples/simple_suite	<TIMESTAMP>
FAIL
exit status 1
